title: Guntakal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Guntakal with a Z-Score of +3.57. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Guntakal is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is approximately 18.8 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this critical event, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
